hero.title: Quality and Trust Reaching
hero.subtitle: In our 5,000 m² production facility, with our team of 300+ experts, we set world standards in the manufacturing of suits, fabric jackets, and trousers.

collections.title: Our Collections
collections.subtitle: With superior quality and modern design approach in every category, we offer our business partners a worldwide competitive advantage.
collections.suitsDesc: Premium suit collection from classic to modern, suited for every style.
collections.jacketsDesc: Jacket collection that stands out with different fabric and cut options.
collections.trousersDesc: Fabric trouser collection that combines comfort and elegance.

whyUs.title: Why Hüda Tekstil?
whyUs.subtitle: We make a difference with decades of experience, modern production infrastructure, and our customer-focused approach.
whyUs.qualityDesc: Each product is meticulously manufactured to international quality standards.
whyUs.exportDesc: Reliable and on-time delivery to more than 25 countries.
whyUs.capacityDesc: Monthly 30,000+ unit production capacity in a 5,000 m² area.
whyUs.customizeDesc: Custom design and private label production service for your brand.

cta.title: We Want to Be Your Business Partner
cta.subtitle: Contact us today for quality production and reliable delivery.

about.pageSubtitle: With years of experience and expertise in the textile industry, we produce at world-class standards.
about.historyP1: Hüda Tekstil, with decades of experience in the textile sector, is one of Turkey's leading manufacturers of suits, fabric jackets, and fabric trousers.
about.historyP2: Our story, which began in a small workshop, has today reached our 5,000 square meter modern production facility and our expert staff of 300. This growth has been achieved by always prioritizing customer satisfaction without compromising quality.
about.historyP3: Since our founding, we have continuously improved our production quality to reach international standards and today export to more than 25 countries.
about.facilityDesc: Our 5,000 square meter indoor facility, equipped with state-of-the-art machines and modern production lines, is optimized for high-volume and quality production.
about.teamDesc: Our nearly 300 experienced employees work with dedication to ensure the highest quality standards at every stage.

corporate.pageSubtitle: Learn more about our production power, quality standards, and export vision.
corporate.productionDesc: In our modern production facility, every stage from fabric cutting to final pressing is meticulously managed. Our suit, fabric jacket, and fabric trouser production lines operate according to the highest efficiency and quality standards.
corporate.productionStep1Desc: Computer-aided precision cutting after raw material quality control.
corporate.productionStep2Desc: Careful handcrafting and machine sewing by our expert tailors.
corporate.productionStep3Desc: Every product passes through 20+ checkpoints before shipment.
corporate.productionStep4Desc: Professional pressing and specialty packaging for delivery.
corporate.qualityDesc: Our quality management system at international standards provides meticulous inspection at every stage from raw material to the final product.
corporate.exportDesc: Our company, which regularly exports to more than 25 countries, is a reliable business partner in the global supply chain.
corporate.wholesaleDesc: With our B2B-focused business model, we offer tailored solutions to retail brands, wholesalers, and private label business partners.

contact.pageSubtitle: Get in touch with us for collaboration opportunities.

footer.description: We offer quality products to the global market with our expert team in the manufacturing of suits, fabric jackets, and fabric trousers.
